name: STOA AI Factory — Linear → Council → Claude → Slack

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "event_type": "linear-ticket-started",
  "client_payload": {
    "ticket_id": "{{ $('Filter: In Progress Only').first().json.body.data.identifier }}",
    "ticket_title": "{{ $('Filter: In Progress Only').first().json.body.data.title }}",
    "ticket_description": "{{ $('Filter: In Progress Only').first().json.body.data.description }}",
    "ticket_priority": "{{ $('Filter: In Progress Only').first().json.body.data.priorityLabel }}",
    "ticket_estimate": "{{ $('Filter: In Progress Only').first().json.body.data.estimate }}",
    "mega_id": "{{ $('Filter: In Progress Only').first().json.body.data.parent?.identifier ?? '' }}",
    "phase_hint": "{{ $('Filter: In Progress Only').first().json.body.data.sortOrder ?? '' }}",
    "component": "{{ ($('Filter: In Progress Only').first().json.body.data.labels?.nodes ?? []).find(l => ['api','gateway','ui','portal','e2e'].includes(l.name))?.name ?? '' }}",
    "slack_thread_ts": "{{ $('Store Message TS').first().json.ts ?? '' }}"
  }
}
